basic.tagline: Designing high-trust digital experiences for modern service brands.

about.description: Northstar Studio helps service-led businesses present their expertise with clear positioning, polished design systems, and practical web experiences that convert visitors into leads.
about.mission: To give growing teams a portfolio website that feels credible, current, and simple to maintain.
about.vision: A web presence where every serious business can launch a professional portfolio without custom development overhead.

services.title: Portfolio Website Design
services.description: Clean multi-section portfolio websites tailored to business positioning and conversion goals.

services.title: Brand Messaging Refresh
services.description: Sharper homepage messaging, about copy, and call-to-action strategy for sales clarity.

services.title: Launch Support
services.description: Repository setup, deployment, and post-launch handoff so teams can own their site.

projects.title: Altura Advisory
projects.description: Consulting portfolio with trust-focused copy, service proof points, and lead capture.
projects.testimonial: Northstar made our services understandable in minutes, not meetings.

projects.title: Motive Spaces
projects.description: Image-led interior design showcase with a premium gallery experience and inquiry flow.
projects.testimonial: The portfolio now feels aligned with the level of work we actually deliver.

testimonials.text: The final site helped us sound like the senior partner we wanted clients to see from day one.
We moved from a generic placeholder page to a portfolio we can confidently send to premium clients.

business.targetAudience: Professional service firms, solo consultants, and boutique teams that need a polished online presence.

seo.websiteTitle: Northstar Studio | Portfolio Websites for Modern Service Brands
seo.metaDescription: Northstar Studio builds professional portfolio websites for freelancers, agencies, startups, and companies using a clear guided workflow.
